interface.shortDescription: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an ex...
interface.longDescription: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.
